name: contentforge
description: Enterprise content production pipeline — 10-phase workflow, 19 skills, 13 agents, fact-checker, 29-pattern AI-detection humanizer, C2PA provenance for the .docx output (EU AI Act Article 50 compliance), May 2026 AEO/GEO reality (AI Overviews, LLMs.txt, Profound/Otterly measurement). Multi-plugin coexistence: zero global hooks, zero auto-connecting MCPs.

interface.shortDescription: Enterprise content production pipeline with humanizer, fact-checker, C2PA provenance, and 10-phase brand-voice workflow.
interface.longDescription: ContentForge brings a canonical 10-phase content production pipeline to OpenAI Codex via 19 portable Agent Skills. Run the full pipeline (title curation -> research -> brief -> draft -> humanizer 29-pattern AI-detection sweep -> fact-checker -> SEO/AEO/GEO optimizer -> reviewer scorecard -> .docx export with C2PA provenance -> social adaptation) or pick individual phases. Skills are platform-portable (same SKILL.md frontmatter open standard used by Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot CLI). 16 opt-in HTTP MCP connectors (Slack, Notion, Canva, Webflow, Gmail, Google Calendar, Figma, etc.) connect only when env vars are configured — zero global hooks, zero auto-connecting MCPs for clean multi-plugin coexistence. Optional Python scripts (humanizer, fact-checker, generate-docx with --c2pa-sign for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance) run when Python 3.8+ is available.
interface.defaultPrompt: Start a new ContentForge content production pipeline.
